chunks.text: Marie Curie was born in Poland and later moved to Paris.
is one of the most famous physicist in the history of science.
Her passion, namely her devotion to science, was extreme.
Together with her husband Pierre, they gave most of their lives to research.
Their goal, to draw out the new element radium, meant years of endless difficulty.
Experiment in the laboratory was the work of turning many tons of mineral into powder.
The couple continued despite the risk, exposing themselves to radiation.
Her honor of two Nobel prizes could not have come without her pure love of study
As a woman, a mother, and a scientist, she showed the path to every generation.
